Container.Name: Bootimus
Container.Overview: Modern PXE/HTTP boot server with embedded iPXE bootloaders, SQLite support, and a full-featured web admin interface. Supports 50+ distros, built-in diagnostic tools (GParted, Clonezilla, Memtest86+), per-client MAC-based access control, JWT authentication, hardware inventory and real-time boot logs.

Config.Name: Admin UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Bootimus admin web interface

Config.Name: HTTP Boot Port
Config.Description: Port for the HTTP boot server (iPXE menu and kernel/initrd serving)

Config.Name: TFTP Port
Config.Description: UDP port for the TFTP server (initial PXE boot)

Config.Name: Data Volume
Config.Description: Persistent data directory (ISOs, database, bootloaders, config)

Config.Name: BOOTIMUS_SERVER_ADDR
Config.Description: IP address of this server announced to PXE clients. Recommended to set explicitly to your Unraid IP; leave empty only if auto-detection works in your network.

Config.Name: BOOTIMUS_TFTP_PORT
Config.Description: TFTP port (must match the exposed port above)

Config.Name: BOOTIMUS_HTTP_PORT
Config.Description: HTTP boot server port (must match the exposed port above)

Config.Name: BOOTIMUS_ADMIN_PORT
Config.Description: Admin interface port (must match the exposed port above)

Config.Name: BOOTIMUS_DATA_DIR
Config.Description: Internal data directory path (do not change)
